face.features: The woman has an expressive face with visible crow's feet around her eyes when she smiles. Her nose is medium-sized with a slightly rounded tip. She has full lips and a wide, genuine smile that reveals her teeth and creates prominent laugh lines around her mouth.

distinctive_features: Natural wavy dark brown hair extending past shoulders
quelques taches de pigmentation/éphélides subtiles sur les joues et le front
Prominent laugh lines/crow's feet around eyes when smiling
A few visible gray hairs near the parting
Subtle freckles on the nose and cheeks
Fine lines around the eyes (crow's feet)
